entity.summary: StableSwap automated-market-maker protocol on Cronos providing low-slippage swaps for pegged and highly correlated assets, smart routing across pools, base and meta liquidity pools, liquidity incentives, staking, and related DeFi functions.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Ferro as a StableSwap AMM protocol designed for pegged and highly correlated assets in the Cronos ecosystem and documents swap routing, base and meta pools, liquidity incentives, staking, SDKs, contracts, and security resources.

evidence.title: Ferro Protocol
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Ferro as a StableSwap AMM protocol for the Cronos ecosystem and documents Ferro Swap, liquidity pools, staking, pool boosts, supported tokens, smart contracts, security, GitHub, and SDK resources.

evidence.title: Ferro Swap
evidence.notes: First-party swap documentation describes token exchange within protocol pools, smart routing across pools, slippage controls, and low-fee stable-asset swaps.

evidence.title: Ferro Pools
evidence.notes: First-party pool documentation describes base pools, meta pools, liquidity deposits and withdrawals, balancing incentives, LP tokens, staking, and reward mechanics.
